text:
Origin (lit. , rom. Depāchā) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game. It allows for a player to transport the target player back to the starting position.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This spell lets the user transport the target player back to the game's starting point. This card can be used to send an attacking player away from the user, or on a fellow teammate if expecting a player returning from the outside world.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1013 :: 
対象プレイヤー１名をスタート地点へ飛ばす。
|-
![Eng]
|No.1013 :: Origin 
Select 1 named player to fly back to the Starting Point.
|}

Trivia

The building in the background of the card's illustration is the Shiso Tree, the entrance to the game.
The player in the illustration of this card is symmetrical to that of "Return".
